tasks.subject: Task 0: Create robots.txt and sitemap.xml
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the two crawlability files so search engines can discover and index the site.

**Files:**
- Create: `robots.txt`
- Create: `sitemap.xml`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `robots.txt` exists at repo root, contains `Allow: /` and `Sitemap:` directive pointing to `https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/sitemap.xml`
- [x] `sitemap.xml` exists at repo root, is valid XML, contains `<loc>https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/</loc>`
- [x] Both files committed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["robots.txt", "sitemap.xml"], "verifyCommand": "cat robots.txt sitemap.xml", "acceptanceCriteria": ["robots.txt contains Allow: / and Sitemap: https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/sitemap.xml", "sitemap.xml contains loc https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/", "both files committed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Create favicon.svg
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create an SVG favicon showing 'c' in dark and 'pdf' in indigo (#4f46e5), matching the app's visual identity.

**Files:**
- Create: `favicon.svg`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `favicon.svg` exists at repo root
- [x] SVG is 32×32 viewBox, white background with rounded corners (rx=6)
- [x] 'c' text in #111827, 'pdf' text in #4f46e5
- [x] File committed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["favicon.svg"], "verifyCommand": "open favicon.svg", "acceptanceCriteria": ["favicon.svg exists at repo root", "SVG viewBox 0 0 32 32, white rect rx=6", "'c' in #111827, 'pdf' in #4f46e5", "file committed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create og-image.svg
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create a 1200×630 SVG social-sharing image with 'cutpdf.app' title (pdf in indigo) and tagline.

**Files:**
- Create: `og-image.svg`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `og-image.svg` exists at repo root
- [x] viewBox is 0 0 1200 630
- [x] Background #f1f5f9, white card with rounded corners
- [x] Title 'cutpdf.app' with 'pdf' in #4f46e5, font-size 112
- [x] Tagline 'PDF schneiden im Browser · kein Upload · kostenlos' in #6b7280
- [x] File committed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["og-image.svg"], "verifyCommand": "open og-image.svg", "acceptanceCriteria": ["og-image.svg exists at repo root", "viewBox 0 0 1200 630", "title with cutpdf.app two-tone text visible", "tagline visible below title", "file committed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Update index.html head — canonical, meta tags, JSON-LD
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix the canonical URL to cutpdf.fieber-it.com and add all missing head tags: favicon link, complete Open Graph, Twitter Card, and JSON-LD WebApplication schema.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` (head block)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] `<link rel='canonical' href='https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/'>` present (not cutpdf.app)
- [x] `<link rel='icon' type='image/svg+xml' href='favicon.svg'>` present
- [x] og:url, og:locale, og:site_name, og:image all present
- [x] twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description, twitter:image all present
- [x] JSON-LD script block present with @type WebApplication
- [x] Changes committed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'canonical|favicon|og:url|twitter:card|WebApplication' index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["canonical href is https://cutpdf.fieber-it.com/", "favicon link tag present", "og:url og:locale og:site_name og:image present", "twitter card tags present", "JSON-LD WebApplication block present", "committed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update index.html body — add use-case section
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a 'Wofür eignet sich cutpdf?' section to the right info card with 4 concrete use-case list items.

**Files:**
- Modify: `index.html` (right card, between 'Open Source' paragraph and 'cutpdf.app unterstützen' section)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] h2 'Wofür eignet sich cutpdf?' visible in right card
- [x] 4 list items visible: Versandetiketten, Poster, Präsentationsfolien, splitten
- [x] Section appears between 'Open Source' note and Ko-Fi support section
- [x] Changes committed

```json:metadata
{"files": ["index.html"], "verifyCommand": "grep -n 'Wofür eignet sich' index.html", "acceptanceCriteria": ["h2 'Wofür eignet sich cutpdf?' present in HTML", "4 list items present (Versandetiketten, Poster, Präsentationsfolien, splitten)", "section is between Open Source paragraph and unterstützen header", "committed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
